title: Frozenland Sword Datapack
description: The Frozenland sword offers players a new and exciting weapon option with enhanced power and a visually striking appearance. Through a custom crafting recipe and hidden enchantments, players can acquire this unique sword to wield against the challenges
body:
The Frozenland Sword datapack and resource pack combination adds a powerful new weapon to Minecraft with a unique crafting recipe and appearance.

**Functionality:**

+ **Crafting Recipe:** Players can obtain the Frozenland Sword by crafting it using a specific recipe.

+ **Enchantments:** The Frozenland Sword comes pre-enchanted with high-level vanilla sword enchantments, including Sharpness, Unbreaking, and Looting, all at level 10.
  
+ **Hidden Enchantments:** These enchantments are hidden from the tooltip, providing a surprise to players who obtain the sword.

+ **Custom Crafting:** To craft the Frozenland Sword, players need to arrange two ice blocks vertically, with two diamonds on the sides of the bottom ice block and a stick below it.
  
**Appearance:**

+ **Resource Pack Modification:** The resource pack changes the appearance of the diamond sword to the Frozenland Sword, giving it a unique and visually appealing look.

+ **Custom Texture:** The Frozenland Sword has its own custom texture, distinct from the vanilla diamond sword, making it easily recognizable in-game.
